summary: Cotrimoxazole is the primary medication used for preventing Pneumocystis jirovecii infections in cancer patients on chemotherapy due to its effectiveness and widespread recommendation by medical guidelines. Other drugs are less suitable or unsupported as first-line prophylactics in these cases.
